title: Tom Tinker's dog
content:
Bow, wow, wow!
            Whose dog art thou?
    "I'm little Tom Tinker's dog,
            Bow, wow, wow!"
meaning:
"Tom Tinker's dog" is a quintessential example of Helen Beatrix Potter's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
